mapper.select: select lot_no, current_process_code, current_seq, has_exited, testing_round, testing_process_code, last_event_type, last_event_time, status, abnormal_msg, update_time from ticket_lot_flow_status where lot_no = #{lotNo}
mapper.insert: insert into ticket_lot_flow_status (lot_no, current_process_code, current_seq, has_exited, testing_round, testing_process_code, last_event_type, last_event_time, status, abnormal_msg, update_time) values (#{lotNo}, #{currentProcessCode}, #{currentSeq}, #{hasExited}, #{testingRound}, #{testingProcessCode}, #{lastEventType}, #{lastEventTime}, #{status}, #{abnormalMsg}, now()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_process_code = #{currentProcessCode}, current_seq = #{currentSeq}, has_exited = #{hasExited}, testing_round = #{testingRound}, testing_process_code = #{testingProcessCode}, last_event_type = #{lastEventType}, last_event_time = #{lastEventTime}, status = #{status}, abnormal_msg = #{abnormalMsg}, update_time = now()
mapper.update: update ticket_lot_flow_status set current_process_code = #{currentProcessCode}, current_seq = #{currentSeq}, has_exited = #{hasExited}, testing_round = #{testingRound}, testing_process_code = #{testingProcessCode}, last_event_type = #{lastEventType}, last_event_time = #{lastEventTime}, status = #{status}, abnormal_msg = #{abnormalMsg}, update_time = now() where lot_no = #{lotNo}
